primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Includes recommendations on genetic testing and risk stratification in CKD

primary_sources.name: Precision Medicine in Nephrology: A Systematic Approach
primary_sources.organization: Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of genomic applications in kidney disease diagnosis and treatment

primary_sources.name: APOL1 Genetic Testing in Clinical Practice: Current Evidence and Implementation
primary_sources.relevance: Clinical guidelines for APOL1 testing and risk assessment in kidney disease

primary_sources.name: Pharmacogenomics in Kidney Transplantation: Clinical Implementation Guide
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based recommendations for pharmacogenomic testing in transplant recipients

secondary_sources.name: Polygenic Risk Scores for Chronic Kidney Disease: Current State and Future Directions
secondary_sources.relevance: Research developments in polygenic risk scoring for CKD prediction

gaps: Limited formal guidelines on polygenic risk score implementation
Lack of standardized protocols for genomic biomarker discovery validation
